app.name: SOVEREIGN.OS
app.error_boundary: Something shifted unexpectedly. We're restoring clarity.
app.offline: You're offline. Your work is preserved locally.

auth.email_sent: A portal link has been sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
auth.verify_body: We've sent a secure link to {{email}}. It expires in 10 minutes.
auth.error_blocked: This email domain is not permitted.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alignment.heading: Alignment Evaluation
alignment.description: Evaluating coherence between intent and output.
alignment.queued: Your evaluation is queued and will resume automatically.
alignment.error_retry: Evaluation encountered an issue. Retry when ready.
alignment.empty_prompt: Describe the agent output or decision to evaluate.

compression.heading: Context Compression
compression.queued: Compression queued. Will resume when the service is available.

simulator.heading: Loop Simulator
simulator.description: Run your agent through a live conversation stream.
simulator.placeholder: What would you like to explore with your agent?
simulator.empty_state: No simulation in progress. Start a new one above.

astrology.heading: Celestial Overlay
astrology.description: Your natal blueprint mapped to today's cosmic currents.
astrology.birth_data_required: Add your birth date in Settings to unlock your natal blueprint.
astrology.no_birth_time: Birth time not set — house positions are approximate.

credits.heading: Credits & Plan
credits.zero_credits: You've used all available credits. Acquire more to continue.

errors.network: Connection interrupted. Your work is safe.
errors.server: The service is temporarily resting. We'll retry shortly.
errors.validation: This input needs a small adjustment before proceeding.
errors.not_found: This path doesn't exist in the current configuration.
errors.unauthorized: Please sign in to access this.
errors.insufficient_credits: More credits are needed for this operation.
errors.stream_timeout: The stream took longer than expected. Please try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected shift occurred. If this continues, reach out.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.delete_confirm: Closing your account is permanent and removes all data. This cannot be undone.

landing.hero_body: SOVEREIGN.OS is the operating system for people who refuse to outsource their thinking. Powerful AI that answers to you — not the other way around.

feature_alignment.title: Alignment Engine
feature_alignment.body: Every AI output is evaluated against your principles before it reaches you.

feature_loop.title: The Loop
feature_loop.body: A continuous intelligence thread that accumulates context across time, never starting from zero.

feature_synthesis.title: Synthesis
feature_synthesis.body: Multiple signals woven into a single coherent understanding — in your voice.

feature_astrology.title: Celestial Overlay
feature_astrology.body: Your natal blueprint meets today's transits. Cosmic context for earthly decisions.

feature_sovereignty.title: Full Sovereignty
feature_sovereignty.body: Your data. Your context. Your rules. Running on infrastructure you control.

landing.social_proof: Trusted by independent thinkers, builders, and visionaries.
landing.footer_copy: © 2026 SOVEREIGN.OS. Intelligence that answers to you.
